name: Lemon Poppyseed Muffin
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Prepare muffin tins for 12 muffins by greasing with butter.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (flour and baking soda) into a bowl and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, cream the butter until smooth. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
6. Stir in lemon juice, vanilla, lemon peel, and poppy seeds.
7. Combine the flour mixture and sour cream with the batter until fully incorporated.
8. Fill muffin tins about three-quarters full with the batter.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Dust with confectioners' sugar and serve warm or cool on a cake rack.
